titles.title: O When The Saints Go Marching

properties.verseOrder: V1 C2 V3 C2 V4 C2 V5 C2 V6 C2 V7 C2 V8 C2 V9 C2 V10 C2 V11 C2 V12 C2

verse.name: V1
verse.lines: We are trav'ling in the footsteps Of those who've gone before But we'll all be reunited (but if we stand reunited) On a new and sunlit shore (then a new world is in store)

verse.name: C2
verse.lines: O When the saints go marching in When the saints go marching in O Lord I want to be in that number When the saints go marching in

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: And when the sun refuse (begins) to shine And when the sun refuse (begins) to shine O Lord I want to be in that number When the saints go marching in

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: When the moon turns red with blood When the moon turns red with blood O Lord I want to be in that number When the saints go marching in

verse.name: V5
verse.lines: On that hallelujah day On that hallelujah day O Lord I want to be in that number When the saints go marching in

verse.name: V6
verse.lines: O when the trumpet sounds the call O when the trumpet sounds the call O Lord I want to be in that number When the saints go marching in

verse.name: V7
verse.lines: Some say this world of trouble Is the only one we need But I'm waiting for that morning When the new world is revealed

verse.name: V8
verse.lines: When the revelation (revolution) comes When the revelation (revolution) comes O Lord I want to be in that number When the saints go marching in

verse.name: V9
verse.lines: When the rich go out and work When the rich go out and work O Lord I want to be in that number When the saints go marching in

verse.name: V10
verse.lines: When the air is pure and clean When the air is pure and clean O Lord I want to be in that number When the saints go marching in

verse.name: V11
verse.lines: When we all have food to eat When we all have food to eat O Lord I want to be in that number When the saints go marching in

verse.name: V12
verse.lines: When our leaders learn to cry When our leaders learn to cry O Lord I want to be in that number When the saints go marching in
